{{Infobox book
| name = Underlord
| slug = cradle-06-underlord
| precedes = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
| follows = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
| cover = [[File:Cover-cradle-06-underlord.jpg|250px]]
| released = 2019
| isbn = 9780999851128
| publisher = Hidden Gnome Publishing
| pages = 348
}}

== Plot summary ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The story begins with a cosmic disturbance as the [[Abidan]] [[Titan]] [[Pariana]] is killed by [[Vroshir]] invaders, prompting the Sixth [[Judge Suriel]] to rewind time and restore the world. In the aftermath of such cosmic shifts, [[Lindon]] and his companions suffer a rough landing after their cloudship runs out of fuel. They are immediately intercepted by the [[Skysworn]], led by [[Underlord]] [[Naru Gwei]]. After a fierce skirmish where [[Lindon]] demonstrates enhanced strength, Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius uses his charisma and a soul-sworn oath to resolve the tension, allowing [[Lindon]]’s group to serve as an official [[Skysworn squad]] under [[Naru Gwei]].

As the squad takes on various missions to fund their advancement, [[Eithan]] provides [[Yerin]] with [[dream tablets]] to aid her [[Blood Shadow]] cultivation and promises to guide the group toward becoming Underlord{{!}}Underlords. Following a confrontation between [[Eithan]] and [[Cassias Arelius]] regarding [[Eithan]]'s duties, the group is led by [[Eithan]] into a pillar of darkness that serves as a gate to the [[Night Wheel Valley]]. This territory, belonging to [[Mercy]]'s family, is rich in [[shadow aura]] and [[natural treasures]]. During their time in the valley, the group uses 'Heaven’s Drops{{!}}Heaven's Drops' to help [[Lindon]] and his companions reach the [[Truegold]] stage, while [[Orthos]] departs on a solitary journey to transform into a [[dragon]].

The peace is shattered when [[King Dakata]] of the [[Seishen Kingdom]] launches a surprise attack to seize the [[Night Wheel Valley]]. Amidst this conflict, [[Lindon]] faces Prince Seishen Kiro{{!}}Prince Kiro, who seeks to punish him, and [[Yerin]] battles the [[Underlady]] [[Riyusai Meira]]. The battle leaves [[Yerin]] with a damaged lifeline, giving her only two months to live unless she can advance to [[Underlord]]. During this period of instability, [[Akura Charity]], the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]], reveals that these conflicts were intended to push the younger generation toward advancement and hints at the approaching Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament.

Seeking to bolster their strength, [[Lindon]] works with the [[Soulsmith]] Fisher Gesha{{!}}Gesha to create high-grade explosive constructs using [[Dross]]'s enhanced simulation abilities. As the [[Seishen Kingdom]] makes significant progress, [[Akura Mercy]] proposes a plan to seize a treasure [[vault]] within the [[Night Wheel Valley]]. This leads to a massive confrontation where the [[Blackflame Empire]] and [[Seishen Kingdom]] fleets clash. [[Lindon]], [[Yerin]], and [[Mercy]] slip away to the [[Akura vault]] to seek advancement, only to be ambushed by Underlord{{!}}Underlords [[Kiro]], [[Daji]], and [[Meira]].

In the heat of the battle, [[Lindon]] utilizes experimental resonance cannons to combat [[Kiro]], while [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] intervenes to save her. Amidst the chaos, [[Lindon]] successfully undergoes his advancement to [[Underlord]], using [[soulfire]] to reconstruct his broken Lindon's skeletal Remnant arm{{!}}Remnant arm. Both [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]] achieve the rank of [[Underlord]], and [[Yerin]] undergoes a transformative advancement that heals her injuries and restores her vitality. Although the [[Blackflame Empire]] is declared the victor of the competition, [[Akura Charity]] disqualifies [[Lindon]] from representing The Empire{{!}}the Empire due to his role in [[Harmony]]'s death, instead placing him under her direct supervision as a representative of the [[Akura clan]]. As the world prepares for the Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament, the cosmic stakes rise as [[Judge Suriel]] discovers that [[Iteration 943]] has been erased by the Reaper’s Scythe{{!}}Reaper's Scythe.}}

== Chapter-by-chapter ==
* '''Chapter 1:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]], a lone [[Abidan]] [[Titan]] stationed on a border world, is ambushed and killed by four powerful [[Vroshir]] invaders who seize control of her defense formations. Just as the world is being destroyed, [[Suriel]], a Sixth [[Judge]], arrives and uses her immense power to rewind time, restoring the world and its people. [[Suriel]] then engages the [[Vroshir]] in a violent battle, ultimately defeating them and erasing the final attacker from existence.}}
* '''Chapter 2:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|After [[Akura Charity]] mourns her grand-nephew [[Harmony]] and decides to monitor the [[Blackflame artist]], [[Lindon]] and his companions make a rough landing on land after their cloudship runs out of fuel. Their relief is short-lived as they are immediately intercepted by a powerful [[Skysworn]] detachment led by the [[Underlord]] [[Naru Gwei]], who accuses them of crimes. When the [[Skysworn]] attempt to forcibly restrain them, [[Lindon]] breaks free from a [[Ruler technique]] and strikes an officer, prompting the [[Skysworn]] to launch a full attack.}}
* '''Chapter 3:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|After a fierce battle where [[Lindon]] uses his enhanced strength and new abilities to incapacitate several [[Skysworn Truegolds]], the conflict ends in a stalemate with [[Underlord]] [[Naru Gwei]]. The group boards a [[Skysworn cloudship]], where [[Lindon]] shares an awkward conversation with [[Mercy]] about her connection to [[Akura Harmony]] and later gives [[Yerin]] high-grade elixirs from his [[void key]] to aid her cultivation.}}
* '''Chapter 4:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]], the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]], visits [[Emperor Naru Huan]] to announce that the [[Akura clan]] will include vassal states in the upcoming [[Uncrowned King Tournament]], offering the [[Night Wheel Valley]] as a training ground for eligible disciples. Following this, [[Lindon]] and his companions meet with [[Skysworn Underlord]] [[Naru Gwei]] to resolve tensions between the group and the [[Skysworn]] officer [[Bai Rou]]. Eithan{{!}}Eithan Arelius intervenes by using his charisma and a soul-sworn oath to convince [[Naru Gwei]] to allow [[Lindon]]'s group to serve as his official [[Skysworn squad]].}}
* '''Chapter 5:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|After receiving their [[Skysworn armor]], [[Lindon]], [[Yerin]], and the rest of the squad begin taking on various [[Skysworn]] missions to earn money for their advancement training. During this time, [[Eithan]] provides [[Yerin]] with several valuable [[dream tablets]] to aid her [[Blood Shadow]] cultivation and promises to guide the group toward becoming Underlord{{!}}Underlords. The chapter concludes with the squad successfully apprehending a group of murderers, while [[Eithan]] secretly intercepts their final escape attempt in an underground [[vault]].}}
* '''Chapter 6:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Cassias Arelius]] confronts [[Eithan]] regarding his abandoned duties as Jai Patriarch{{!}}Patriarch, eventually agreeing to let [[Eithan]] serve as an [[Underlord]] and nominate candidates for the Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament. Two months later, [[Eithan]] leads [[Lindon]] and his team into a massive pillar of darkness that has appeared near [[Blackflame City]], revealing it to be a gate to the [[Night Wheel Valley]]. As the [[Akura Sage]] announces this opportunity to various vassal states, she subtly challenges the young generation to compete, specifically targeting [[Lindon]] due to his involvement in a death within her family.}}
* '''Chapter 7:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|After being teleported through a spatial transmission, [[Lindon]] and his companions arrive in the [[Night Wheel Valley]], a territory belonging to [[Mercy]]'s family that is filled with dense [[shadow aura]] and [[natural treasures]]. [[Lindon]] and [[Mercy]] begin harvesting death-[[aura]] treasures from a battlefield clearing, while [[Yerin]] and [[Orthos]] accompany [[Eithan]] to collect glowing mushrooms. Throughout the journey, [[Yerin]] uses her [[dream tablets]] to contemplate different methods for advancing her [[Blood Shadow]], weighing the common paths against the legendary technique of the [[Blood Sage]].}}
* '''Chapter 8:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|After arriving at a massive settlement near the [[Night Wheel Valley]], [[Eithan]] retrieves several 'Heaven’s Drops{{!}}Heaven's Drops' from a merchant to help [[Lindon]] and his companions advance their cultivation. Using [[Lindon]]'s [[Spirit Well water]] as a catalyst, the group uses the constructs to reach the [[Truegold]] stage, though [[Mercy]] declines to participate. The chapter concludes with a somber farewell as [[Orthos]] departs on a solitary journey to undergo his own transformation into a [[dragon]].}}
* '''Chapter 9:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[King Dakata]] of the [[Seishen Kingdom]] plans a sudden attack to seize the [[Night Wheel Valley]] from the [[Blackflame Empire]], despite [[Kiro]]'s warnings about potential retaliation from a [[Sage]]. Meanwhile, [[Lindon]] struggles with the spiritual requirements of advancing to [[Underlord]] while patrolling the valley. The tension culminates when [[Lindon]] intervenes in a skirmish against an enemy [[Underlord]], only to discover the attacker is Prince Seishen Kiro{{!}}Prince Kiro, who has come specifically to punish him.}}
* '''Chapter 10:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] and [[Mercy]] engage in a desperate battle against [[Riyusai Meira]], an [[Underlady]] life artist seeking [[Lindon]], while [[Yerin]] risks her own lifeline to feed a growing [[Blood Shadow]]. Simultaneously, [[Lindon]] faces off against [[Kiro]], utilizing shifting [[Enforcer techniques]] and [[Blackflame madra]] to match the prince's strength. The chapter concludes with [[Lindon]] unleashing a swirling vortex of red aura against [[Kiro]] and [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]] becoming an increasingly powerful, draining parasite.}}
* '''Chapter 11:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|After a desperate attempt to flee from Prince Seishen Kiro{{!}}Prince Kiro, [[Lindon]] is wounded but manages to distract the [[Underlord]] before being rescued by [[Mercy]] and [[Yerin]]. [[Yerin]] engages [[Kiro]] and an [[Underlady]] named [[Meira]] in a high-level battle alongside her [[Blood Shadow]], but the two Underlord{{!}}Underlords eventually use a [[gatestone]] to escape. Meanwhile, as the [[Seishen Kingdom]] launches a massive surprise attack on the [[Blackflame Empire]], [[Eithan]] arrives to assist [[Cassias]] and Jing{{!}}Naru Jing in stabilizing their retreating lines.}}
* '''Chapter 12:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|After the [[Seishen Kingdom]] attack, [[Lindon]] discovers he is ranked ninety-sixth among the top one hundred [[Truegold]] combatants, while [[Yerin]] is ranked eighty-seventh. [[Lindon]] learns that [[Yerin]]'s lifeline was severely damaged in battle, leaving her with only two months to live unless she can advance to [[Underlord]]. To bolster her strength, [[Eithan]] provides a massive feast of high-quality [[aura]]-rich food and elixirs to help [[Yerin]] recover her fighting condition.}}
* '''Chapter 13:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|While sheltering in the rain, [[Mercy]] is visited by [[Akura Charity]], who explains that the recent conflicts were intended to push competitors like [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] toward advancement. [[Charity]] reveals that a major Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament is approaching amidst the rising threat of the [[Dreadgods]] and offers [[Mercy]] a favor. The conversation concludes with [[Charity]] attempting to guilt [[Mercy]] into returning to the [[Akura clan]] to lead, before the [[Sage]] vanishes into the shadows.}}
* '''Chapter 14:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]] takes [[Lindon]] and [[Dross]] to visit the [[Soulsmith]] [[Fisher Gesha]], where [[Eithan]] provides [[Dross]] with a [[library]] [[construct]] to expand his knowledge and abilities. Using [[Dross]]'s enhanced ability to simulate complex experiments, [[Lindon]] successfully creates a high-grade explosive [[construct]] and begins planning new projects with Fisher Gesha{{!}}Gesha. Meanwhile, [[Yerin]] struggles with the presence of her growing [[Blood Shadow]], attempting to assert dominance over the entity as it feeds.}}
* '''Chapter 15:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|While attempting to reach [[Underlord]], [[Lindon]] discovers his revelation is a fear of being worthless after [[Mercy]] advises him to follow his fear. [[Yerin]] also attempts to find her revelation through the same method but is interrupted by an alarm. The group is summoned by [[Captain Naru Gwei]], who explains that the [[Blackflame Empire]] is effectively withdrawing from the tournament due to the [[Seishen Kingdom]]'s progress.}}
* '''Chapter 16:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|In the [[Blackflame Empire]], [[Akura Mercy]] proposes a plan to [[the Emperor]] and his Underlord{{!}}Underlords to seize a [[vault]] of [[natural treasures]] within the [[Night Wheel Valley]]. Meanwhile, at a celebration in the [[Seishen Kingdom]], the [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] appears to declare that the competition for her favor is not over. She provides a map and instructions for a new confrontation between the two nations, specifically warning that [[Akura Mercy]] must not be harmed.}}
* '''Chapter 17:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] and his companions travel via [[Imperial cloudship]] through a portal to the [[Seishen Kingdom]], where [[Eithan]] gifts [[Lindon]] the [[Archstone]]. Upon arriving at the [[Akura fortress]], the expedition is ambushed by a boundary field that dazes the crew and is met by an approaching enemy fleet led by the [[Seishen King]]. Realizing they are heavily outnumbered, [[the Emperor]] and [[Eithan]] decide to abandon their mission and attempt a fighting retreat.}}
* '''Chapter 18:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|As the [[Blackflame Empire]] and [[Seishen Kingdom]] ships clash, [[Lindon]], [[Yerin]], and [[Mercy]] slip away into the [[Akura vault]] to seek advancement amidst its rich [[natural treasures]]. Their attempt at progress is interrupted when Prince Seishen Kiro{{!}}Prince Kiro, [[Daji]], and [[Meira]] enter the [[vault]] to confront them. Facing overwhelming odds against three Underlord{{!}}Underlords, [[Lindon]] prepares for a desperate stand by drawing a cannon from his [[void key]].}}
* '''Chapter 19:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|As [[the Emperor]]'s ship is intercepted by [[King Dakata]] and his Underlord{{!}}Underlords, a massive battle erupts involving the [[Blackflame Empire]]'s leadership. Simultaneously, [[Lindon]] uses experimental resonance cannons to combat the [[Underlord]] [[Kiro]], while [[Yerin]] faces [[Meira]] and her [[Blood Shadow]] intervenes to save her. Nearby, the [[Underlord]] [[Daji]] brutally defeats [[Akura Mercy]] before being abruptly silenced by an unknown force.}}
* '''Chapter 20:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|After losing a bet to her mother, [[Akura Mercy]] returns to the [[Akura clan]] as an heir, regaining her full power and physical talents. Meanwhile, in a chaotic battlefield, [[Lindon]] undergoes an advancement to [[Underlord]], using [[soulfire]] to reconstruct his broken Lindon's skeletal Remnant arm{{!}}Remnant arm into a perfect human limb. As [[Lindon]] completes his transformation, he rushes to save [[Yerin]] from [[Meira]] while [[Kiro]] is overwhelmed by a destructive red wave of [[madra]] from [[Lindon's axe]].}}
* '''Chapter 21:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Following a series of intense battles, [[Mercy]] and [[Lindon]] both advance to the rank of [[Underlord]], while [[Yerin]] undergoes a transformative advancement that heals her scars and restores her vitality. [[Akura Charity]], the [[Sage]], declares the [[Blackflame Empire]] the victors of the competition and awards them massive reparations. However, [[Charity]] informs [[Lindon]] that because he caused the death of [[Harmony]], he is disqualified from representing the [[Blackflame Empire]] and must instead compete as a representative of the [[Akura clan]] under her direct supervision.}}
* '''Chapter 22:''' {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Judge Suriel]] discovers that [[Iteration 943]] has been completely erased by the Reaper’s Scythe{{!}}Reaper's Scythe while the [[Abidan]] face widespread attacks. Meanwhile, [[Yerin]] learns she has been selected for the upcoming Uncrowned King Tournament{{!}}Uncrowned King tournament, with [[Eithan]] revealed as the team leader. In [[Sacred Valley]], Kelsa{{!}}Wei Shi Kelsa attempts to escape hunters from the [[Fallen Leaf School]] but is intercepted by [[Orthos]], who informs her that [[Lindon]] is alive.}}

== Characters ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Mercy]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dross]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Eithan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Meira]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Orthos]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Little Blue]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Mercy]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Charity]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Daji]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Harmony]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Malice]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Jing]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Gwei]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Charity]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Daji]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Suriel]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Sage of the Silver Heart]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Pariana]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Naru Huan|Emperor]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Cassias]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|silver-and-purple owl}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Cassias Arelius]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Bai Rou]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Suu]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen King]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Presence]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Northstrider]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Renfei]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura Fury]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Prince Seishen Kiro]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[King Dakata]]}}

== Locations & groups ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel Valley]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Blackflame Empire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Kingdom]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura clan]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Arelius family]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Blackflame City]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Redflower family]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Sacred Valley]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Vroshir]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Brightcrown]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Akura vault]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Underlords]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Monarchs]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Empire (Cradle)]]}}

== Abilities & sacred arts ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Goldsign]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Endless Sword]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Copper sight]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ruler technique]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|hunger binding}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soul Cloak]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Titan’s Blade]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[vital aura]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Blackflame madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[hunger madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's Blood Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[black dragon's breath]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Strings of Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[shadow aura]]}}

== Artifacts & constructs ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn armor]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Thousand-Mile Cloud]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Remnant]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[void key]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Harmony's axe]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Heaven's Drop]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Kiro's armor]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Archstone]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Meira's scythe]]}}

== Events & concepts ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Skysworn]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Blood Shadow]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Underlord]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Ghostwater]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Truegold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Uncrowned King Tournament]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Highgold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Underlady]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Blackflame]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Soulsmiths]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Striker]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[pure madra]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Way]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Dreadgods]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lowgold]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Sage]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Bleeding Phoenix]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Monarch]]}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|advancement}} • {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Night Wheel]]}}

== Sources ==
* https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cradle
* https://openlibrary.org/works/OL20857118W

{{Willverse books nav}}

[[Category:Books]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
